CVE-2013-1992.title: Multiple integer overflows in X.org libdmx 1.1.2 and earlier allo ...
CVE-2013-1992.description: Multiple integer overflows in X.org libdmx 1.1.2 and earlier allow X servers to trigger allocation of insufficient memory and a buffer overflow via vectors related to the (1) DMXGetScreenAttributes, (2) DMXGetWindowAttributes, and (3) DMXGetInputAttributes functions.
